name: Theodore Trichinas
troparia: (Tone 8) Your abundant tears made the wilderness bloom,* and your sufferings made your labours fruitful a hundredfold;* you became a shining torch over the world.* O venerable father Ephrem,* pray to Christ our God that He may save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 4) You became famous for your life, O wise father Theodore.* Fore, dressed in the rough garment of a hair shirt, you won treasures of heaven,* which surpass those of any king.* Now you have traded your laborer’s garb for heaven’s robes.* Pray unceasingly for all of us, O venerable father.
